findings.evidence: grep hit: line 45 `· simp [hp]`; the negative branch already uses `oddPrimeDiscriminant_of_mod_four_ne_one hp` explicitly.
findings.fix: Use explicit rewrites such as `rw [oddPrimeDiscriminant_of_mod_four_eq_one hp, if_pos hp]` so the proof is tied to the API rather than definitional shape.
findings.issue: `legendreSym_oddPrimeDiscriminant` closes the positive branch with `simp [hp]`, relying on unfolding the `oddPrimeDiscriminant` wrapper instead of the public rewrite lemma.

findings.evidence: grep hits: lines 95-98 and 101-105 repeat the same `hsymm` construction from `legendreSym_oddPrimeDiscriminant_eq_legendreSym` in opposite directions.
findings.fix: Replace the constructor proof with `forall_congr'`/pointwise application of `legendreSym_oddPrimeDiscriminant_eq_one_iff`, introducing the local `Fact` once per index.
findings.issue: `forall_legendreSym_oddPrimeDiscriminant_eq_one_iff` duplicates both directions with the same local equality proof, obscuring that it is just the pointwise iff lifted through `∀`.

summary: The new proofs mostly use explicit lemmas, but two spots rely on brittle proof structure instead of the already packaged facts.
